apple_id.title: Apple ID
apple_id.enter_email_password: Please enter both email and password.
apple_id.valid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
apple_id.two_factor_prompt: Please enter the verification code sent to your device.
apple_id.max_certs_desc: iloader will revoke your existing certificates and generate a new one.
apple_id.no_keyring_available: Unable to save credentials on this device.

device.title: iDevice
device.pairing_in_progress_hint: Please unlock your device and click "Trust," then enter your passcode if prompted.

operations.install_sidestore_success_message: Open SideStore and refresh it to complete the installation!
operations.install_livecontainer_success_message: To complete the installation, open LiveContainer, choose settings, and click "Import Certificate From SideStore." Then, choose apps, click the sidestore icon, and refresh LiveContainer.

pairing.name: Name
pairing.advanced_export_message: This is not recommended unless you know what you're doing. Press "Place" next to an app to transfer it automatically instead. Are you sure you still want to export your pairing file?

settings.reset_anisette_message: Are you sure you want to reset the anisette state? You will be required to enter your 2FA code again.
settings.delete_stored_rppairing_message: Are you sure you want to delete the stored pairing file for this device? This will require you to pair again.
settings.dont_use_keyring_message: This makes iloader less secure by storing pairing files, anisette state, and certitficates on disk. Enable this only if the default keyring storage doesn't work and you understand the risks.

error.title: An Error Occured: {{msg}}

underage: Your Apple ID may be below the required age to use developer services.
account_locked: Don't panic! This usually occurs after multiple failed login attempts, but it is completely harmless.
auth: Make sure your credentials are correct and try again, even if they were correct.
If the issue persists, try using another Apple ID.
Security Key 2FA is not supported. If possible, use an Apple ID with no 2FA or with trusted device 2FA.
download: Download SideStore manually from ((link:https://github.com/SideStore/SideStore/releases)) and use the "Import IPA" button to install it.
house_arrest: [ios::26.3]Ensure your device is not on a developer beta of iOS 26.3, as it has a bug with house arrest
pairing: Try reconnecting the device and running the action again.
Ensure your device has a passcode set.
Ensure your device is connected via USB, not wirelessly.
usbmuxd: [platform::windows]Ensure you have iTunes installed and check that it can detect your device.
[platform::windows]Uninstall iTunes and Apple Mobile Device Support, then install "Apple Devices" from the Microsoft Store.
[platform::linux]Make sure usbmuxd is installed and running.
trust: Unlock your device, go to the home screen, and accept any trust prompts that appear.
device_coms: Ensure your device is properly connected to your computer.
Unplug and reconnect the device. If the issue persists, try a different USB port and cable.
not_logged_in: Sign in to your Apple ID first.
anisette: Ensure your computer is connected to the internet.
Change your anisette server. Try several different servers.
Make sure you can access ((link:{{anisetteServerUrl}})) in a browser.
keyring: Try enabling "Don't use keyring" in settings to bypass this issue. Note that this is less secure.
misc: Try again. Restarting the app, your computer, and/or your phone may also help.
admin: Try running the app with elevated permissions (as administrator/root).
filesystem: Make sure iloader has permission to read and write files on your system.
not_enough_app_ids: You do not have enough App IDs available to install this app.
Wait for App IDs to expire after 7 days (cannot be deleted sooner), then try again.
Installing apps from SideStore sometimes allows you to use less App IDs, so try installing from there instead.
max_apps: You can only have 3 sideloaded apps installed at a time with a free Apple ID.
Delete other sideloaded apps to free up space for this one.
Expired apps still count towards the 3 app limit.

error.support_message: If the issue persists, press "Copy to clipboard" and send the copied error to the <discord>Discord</discord> or a <github>GitHub issue</github> for support.

update.new_version_available: A new version is available: {{version}}. Do you want to update?
